* Support the dissemination of research outcomes through appropriate channels and outlets.
* Undertake discipline-appropriate research activities, e.g. surveys, literature reviews, data gathering and/or recording of results using appropriate research methods.
* Participate in and/or present at conferences and/or workshops relevant to the project as required.
* Assist with the supervision of research students in the research area where required.
* Align with and actively demonstrate the Code of Conduct and Values.
* Cooperate with all health and safety policies and procedures of the university and take all reasonable care to ensure that your actions or omissions do not impact on the health and safety of yourself or others.


**About The Successful Applicant**
 (Selection Criteria)
   

  

**To Be Successful In This Role You Will Have**
* A PhD in a discipline related to climate risk and response, including, but not limited to: law, psychology, behavioural science, economics, business, public policy, climate science, data science, or other fields in which a demonstrable connection to the research priority areas of the ICRR can be made.
* Proven commitment to proactively keeping up to date with discipline knowledge and developments.
* Demonstrated ability to undertake high quality academic research and conduct independent research with limited supervision.
* Demonstrated track record of publications and conference presentations relative to opportunity.
* Demonstrated ability to work in a team, collaborate across disciplines and build effective relationships.
* Evidence of highly developed interpersonal skills.
* Demonstrated ability to communicate and interact with a diverse range of stakeholders and students.
* An understanding of and commitment to UNSW’s aims, objectives and values in action, together with relevant policies and guidelines.
* Knowledge of health and safety responsibilities and commitment to attending relevant health and safety training.


**You should systematically address the selection criteria listed above in your application.**
**Please apply online - applications will not be accepted if sent to the contact listed.**
**Contact** 
 :
   

  

 Ben Newell
   

  

**E:** 
 ben.newell@unsw.edu.au
   

  

**Applications close:** 
 March 9th, 2026
   

  

**Pre-Employment Checks**
 Aligned with UNSW’s focus on cultivating a workplace defined by safety, ethical conduct, and strong integrity preferred candidates will be required to participate in a combination of pre-employment checks relevant to the role they have applied for.
   

  

 These pre-employment checks may include a combination of some of the following checks:-
   

  

* National and International Criminal history checks
* Entitlement to work and ID checks
* Working With Children Checks
* Completion of a Gender-Based Violence Prevention Declaration
* Verification of relevant qualifications
* Verification of relevant professional membership
* Employment history and reference checks
* Financial responsibility assessments/checks
* Medical Checks and Assessments


 Compliance with the necessary combination of these checks is a condition of employment at UNSW.
   

  

**Find Out More About Working At UNSW At Www.unsw.edu.au**
*UNSW is committed to equity diversity and inclusion. Applications from women, people of culturally and linguistically diverse backgrounds, those living with disabilities, members of the LGBTIQ+ community; and people of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander descent, are encouraged. UNSW provides workplace adjustments for people with disability, and access to flexible work options for eligible staff. The University reserves the right not to proceed with any appointment.*

title: Strategic Managed Service Sales Lead | Client & Industries | Nordics
description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

 Shape the future of managed services by leading high impact, technology enabled deals at scale. You thrive in complex environments in a sector, build trusted C-suite relationships, and turn long-term vision into near-term wins. If you want to drive growth, influence strategy, and showcase true end-to-end capabilities, this role is for you.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 This role offers the opportunity to shape and grow a strategic managed services portfolio by originating complex, technology‑enabled deals and building long‑term client partnerships. You will balance long‑term sales strategy with shorter initiatives that demonstrate value, build trust, and accelerate momentum with key clients. Working closely with cross‑functional teams, you will turn client needs into scalable, profitable managed services that drive sustained growth.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
 You will be responsible for driving strategic managed services growth within one designated EY industry portfolio (Energy, Technology Media & Telecom, Financial Services, Consumer & Health, or Private Equity). The role combines long‑term sales strategy with hands‑on deal origination, close collaboration across teams, and senior client engagement to deliver sustainable, profitable growth.
   

  

* Own and grow the industry portfolio: Define and execute sales strategies for your assigned industry, balancing long‑term growth ambitions with short‑term initiatives that demonstrate value and build client trust.
* Originate and lead opportunities: Proactively identify, shape, and progress complex managed services opportunities in close collaboration with account teams and internal stakeholders.
* Build relationships and market insight: Develop trusted relationships with senior clients and stakeholders, monitor market and competitor dynamics, and adapt strategies to capture emerging opportunities.


**Qualifications**
**Skills and attributes for success**
* Extensive experience in sales and business development, with a strong focus on originating complex deals and selling technology-enabled, “as-a-service” solutions
* Proven ability to drive profitable growth through long-term sales strategies while delivering short-term commercial results
* Experience managing complex sales cycles, large deals, and senior client stakeholders.
* Proven strategic, commercial, and analytical capability to identify, shape, and close high-impact opportunities
* Excellent negotiation and stakeholder management skills, engaging confidently with executives, alliances, and cross-functional teams


**Ideally, you’ll also**
* Have an MBA or equivalent advanced degree, or relevant certifications in sales leadership or business strategy.
* Experience working with alliance and ecosystem partners


**What We Look For**
* Resilient and adaptable, thriving in complex and fast-changing environments
* Highly collaborative, working across EY account teams, service lines, and delivery to bring integrated value to clients
* Trust-building and client-focused, with a strong drive for results and long-term relationships


**What We Offer You**
 At EY, we’ll develop you with future-focused skills and equip you with world-class experiences. We’ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams. Learn more.
   

  

**Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.**
 Please submit your application no later than 31st of March 2026. We are continuously conducting interviews, so don’t wait with your application. If you have questions about the role, please contact Paula Carlstedt at Paula.Carlstedt@fi.ey.com. For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact Simon Aspler at simon.aspler@se.ey.com.
   

  

 Please note that a background check will be conducted as part of the recruitment process.
   

  

 At EY, we celebrate diversity and encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds. If you have any questions, require assistance, or need adjustments to the recruitment process due to a disability, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at recruitmentsweden@se.ey.com. We are here to support you.
   

  

**EY | Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

title: Ekonomiadministratör till institutionen för molekylär medicin och kirurgi
description:
****Vill du bidra till att förbättra människors hälsa?****




 Nu söker vi dig med erfarenhet av ekonomi- och redovisningsarbete som vill arbeta deltid i meningsfull verksamhet. Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på 30 % och passar dig som vill kombinera kvalificerat administrativt arbete med möjligheten att bidra till forskningsmiljöer i framkant.
   

  





**Om verksamheten**




 Vid institutionen för molekylär medicin och kirurgi (MMK) bedriver vi preklinisk och klinisk forskning inom ett stort antal områden. Hos oss är ca 600 forskare, forskarstuderande, lärare samt teknisk och administrativ personal verksamma. Inom institutionens administrativa avdelning arbetar drygt tio personer inom områdena ekonomi, HR, utbildningsadministration, arkiv, ledningsstöd, kommunikation och IT.
   

  





 Ekonomifunktionen består i dag av fem medarbetare som arbetar med löpande redovisning, controlling och stöd till forskare och chefer. För att stärka gruppen långsiktigt söker vi dig som vill ta ansvar för delar av vår ekonomiadministration.
   

  





****Din roll****




 Arbetet består huvudsakligen av löpande redovisningsuppgifter såsom kundreskontra/fakturering, omföringar, avtalsreskontra (kontraktshantering externa forskningsmedel), ekonomiska redovisningar till finansiärer. Även andra ekonomiadministrativa uppgifter kan ingå beroende på kompetens och erfarenhet. Vi arbetar i affärssystemet Unit4 Business World (UBW).
   

  





 Du samarbetar närmast med övriga inom ekonomifunktionen på institutionen men arbetet innebär också vissa kontakter med forskare och teknisk/administrativ personal ute i våra forskargrupper.
   

  





****Vem är du?****




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom ekonomi, eller motsvarande relevant erfarenhet
* Erfarenhet av löpande ekonomiredovisning
* Erfarenhet av ekonomiadministration inom universitet/högskola
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, noggrant och självständigt
* God servicekänsla och förmåga att prioritera i ditt arbete



 Meriterande:
 


* Erfarenhet från forskningsverksamhet
* Erfarenhet av UBW, i synnerhet avtalsreskontra och kundfakturering



 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet, samarbetsförmåga och ansvarstagande.
   

  





****Vad erbjuder vi?****




 En kreativ, internationell och inspirerande miljö fylld av kompetens och nyfikenhet. Karolinska Institutet är ett av världens ledande medicinska universitet. Vår vision är att driva utvecklingen av kunskap om livet och verka för en bättre hälsa för alla. Här bedriver vi framgångsrik medicinsk forskning och har det största utbudet av medicinska utbildningar i Sverige. Som universitet är Karolinska Institutet en statlig myndighet. Det gör att du får goda förmåner genom vårt kollektivavtal. Medarbetare på KI erbjuds också möjlighet till ett flexibelt arbetssätt. Det innebär att om den verksamhet du jobbar i tillåter, så kan du arbeta en del av din arbetstid på distans. Du får även träna fritt i våra moderna friskvårdsanläggningar där utbildad personal finns på plats.  
   

  





**Placering:** 
 Solna
   

  





*Tio skäl att välja Karolinska Institutet*




****Ansökan****

title: Kravanalytiker
description:
Är du en erfaren kravanalytiker med intresse för teknik och har en bakgrund inom systemutveckling? Vill du hjälpa våra kunder göra världen lite bättre? Då kan du vara den vi söker.
   

  

 HiQ är ett av Sveriges mest tekniktunga och spännande konsultbolag med kunder inom en rad olika branscher. Som en av oss på HiQ får du inte bara möjlighet att jobba med kompetenta kollegor och utvecklande uppdrag, du får även ett kontor med stark teamanda, fantastisk utsikt över Slussen och en roll där du får diskutera och lösa komplexa situationer tillsammans med dina kollegor.
   

  

 I rollen som kravanalytiker kommer du bland annat få analysera och omvandla kunders nuläge, behov och processer till värdeskapande IT-lösningar. Du kommer arbeta med många kontaktytor och olika stakeholders i organisationen, vilket ställer höga krav på din förmåga att skapa förtroende och bygga starka relationer med våra kunder.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Ingenjörsexamen i datateknik, teknisk fysik, elektroteknik eller motsvarande
* Minst fem års erfarenhet av att ha arbetat som kravanalytiker/business analyst
* Intresse för och erfarenhet av agila metoder, gärna SAFe
* Teknisk bakgrund
* Svenskt medborgarskap samt är flytande i svenska och engelska


**Meriterande:**
* Tidigare arbetslivserfarenhet inom offentlig sektor/health tech/medtech


**Personliga egenskaper:**
 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och letar efter dig som är flexibel och kommunikativ som trivs i en miljö där förändringar är en del av vardagen. Du värdesätter också ett gott samarbete i teamet och delar gärna med dig av dina tidigare erfarenheter till dina kollegor.
   

  

**Varför HiQ**
 Sedan 1995 har HiQ varit konsultbolaget som förenklat världen för både kunder och slutanvändare med hjälp av teknik, design och kommunikation. HiQ har alltid fokuserat på två saker: att ha kul på jobbet och att leverera lösningar utöver förväntningar - det är vad som driver oss framåt! Vi HiQare är stolta över att ha en kultur som präglas av
 **resultat** 
 ,
 **ansvar, enkelhet** 
 och
 **glädje** 
 . Vi tror på att arbeta tillsammans för att nå våra gemensamma mål och strävar efter att hjälpa varandra att fortsätta växa och utvecklas. Hos oss får du utöver chansen att utveckla din egen kompetens också möjlighet att lära, leda och inspirera dina kollegor.
   

  

*I denna rekrytering tillämpar vi löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstiden har gått ut. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*

title: Senior Analyst (Supply Analytics, Bangkok-based, Relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**THIS ROLE IS BASED IN BANGKOK, THAILAND (WITH RELOCATION PROVIDED)
   

  

 Location: Bangkok, Thailand (\*Not open for remote work)**
**Get to Know our Team:**
 As part of the Supply Analytics, you will be responsible for identifying new partners and opportunities, cultivating a relationship with them, and working together with them to deliver the best outcome for our end customers. You would also be responsible with managing the day-to-day interaction with the partner and working closely with other teams within Agoda to ensure the partners needs are met.
   

  

 We design tailored business and product solutions with our partners and help them generate measurable value. Members of our team are empowered and supported to grow their market(s) or accounts. We develop win-win relationships and leverage Agoda’s unique accommodations portfolio and tech solutions to bring our partners the advantages they seek. Utilizing our strong brand and resources, we build new channels to increase the visibility of Agoda, introduce more travelers to our great products and service and deliver significant revenues to the overall business.
   

  

**The Opportunity:**
 As a Senior Analyst, you will report directly to either the Senior Manager or Associate Director within the Supply Department and this will be an individual contributor role. You will be responsible and fully empowered to work with the partners on the ground. You will be supported by a team within the Supply department and work closely with other Team members within Agoda.
   

  

**In this Role, you’ll get to** 
 :
   

  

* Translate internal briefs into analytical projects (to include refining the initial brief and asking the ‘right questions’, working through potential hypotheses and storyboarding the output)
* Use and analyze data from multiple large-scale data warehouses and present statistically strong analysis to a wide range of business stakeholders.
* Proactively identify opportunities for growth within supply and the wider business.
* Drive new analytical initiatives and projects aimed at improving organizational efficiency and shaping Agoda supply.
* Identify, support, and lead projects aimed at scaling up the way the Supply organization leverages on data, insights, and intelligence.
* Automate manual operational processes and present back on time savings gained through modernization of business operations


**What you’ll Need to Succeed** 
 :
   

  

* At least 2-5+ years of experience working as an Analyst with experience in analytics/data science/insights/strategy/BI
* Advanced working knowledge and hands-on experience in SQL
* Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in data visualization tools such as Tableau (preferably)
* Expert domain of data analysis and data visualization tools and software such as Excel, Python (or R)
* Bachelor’s degree ideally in a business or quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
* A good understanding of statistical modelling knowledge or any machine learning technique knowledge (such as hypothesis testing, regression, logistic regression, random forest, etc.)
* Good stakeholder management experience. Comfortable presenting to senior leadership and C-suite.
* Experience in conducting A/B testing experimentation
* Strong experience in finding data insights and provide business recommendation to the business
* A hacker’s mindset – the ability to build simple but clever and elegant solutions to new problems within significant resource, operational and time constraints through deep understanding of the business, creative problem solving, and a wide range of expertise in data, analytics, automation, programming, and prototyping.
* Excellent communicator with superior written, verbal, presentation and interpersonal communication skills.
* Data driven in both decision making and performance measurement.
* Extreme comfort in ambiguous, fast-paced environment.
* Ability to multi-task, prioritize and coordinate resources.


**It’s Great if you Have:**
* MBA or Masters in a quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
* Program management certifications (e.g. PMI, PRINCE2) to compliment your program management experience.
* Asian market experience.
* Travel industry / e-commerce / tech / consulting experience.

 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
*Vi söker dig som vill vara med och bygga framtidens dataplattformar säkra, skalbara och smarta lösningar som gör skillnad på riktigt. Hos oss på Advania får du arbeta i en central roll med stort tekniskt inflytande, i ett team där din erfarenhet värderas högt och där vi tillsammans ger människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden genom teknik.*
 Senior Data Engineer hos oss arbetar du nära både teknik och verksamhet. Du tar ansvar för utvecklingen av vår datainfrastruktur, driver arkitekturfrågor och är med och formar riktningen framåt i molnet och i hybridmiljöer.
   

  

 Senior Data Engineer på Advania 🚀
   

  

 Som Senior Data Engineer ansvarar du för att designa, utveckla och förvalta våra dataplattformar och pipelines både i molnet och i hybridmiljöer. Du arbetar med att bygga och vidareutveckla Lakehouse arkitekturer, säkra integrationer mellan on-prem och moln, samt skapa stabila och tillförlitliga dataflöden i produktion.
   

  

 Du har en viktig roll i att optimera prestanda, datasäkerhet och kvalitet i våra lösningar. Det innebär också att du arbetar nära verksamheten för att förstå databehov och omsätta dem till robusta tekniska lösningar. Som senior förväntas du bidra till våra tekniska riktlinjer och vara ett stöd för andra ingenjörer i teamet både genom kodgranskning, kunskapsdelning och diskussioner kring arkitektur.
   

  

 🔹 Du coachar och stöttar andra ingenjörer och är en teknisk förebild
   

  

 🔹 Du samarbetar tvärfunktionellt med arkitekter, analytiker och affärsrepresentanter
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett erfaret och sammansvetsat team med data engineers, arkitekter och plattformspecialister. Vi arbetar agilt, med dagliga standups, kodgranskningar, designsessioner och tät kommunikation. Du har en nyckelroll i att både utveckla lösningar och påverka helheten vi litar på din erfarenhet och din vilja att driva förbättringar.
   

  

 Vi samarbetar tätt med affärssidan, IT, säkerhetsfunktioner och externa partners, där du får möjlighet att vara med och påverka hela kedjan från behov till verklig nytta.
   

  

 Vad vi söker hos dig ✨
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är en erfaren dataingenjör med både djup teknisk kompetens och en stark känsla för helhet och ansvar. Du har flera års erfarenhet av att arbeta med dataplattformar i produktion gärna i komplexa miljöer där både on-prem och moln ingår och du trivs med att kombinera hands-on utveckling med arkitektoniska vägval.
   

  

 Du har god förståelse för distribuerad databehandling, framför allt med Spark eller liknande ramverk, och du har byggt pipelines som verkligen används inte bara som proof of concept. Du programmerar gärna i Python eller Scala och har jobbat med moderna arkitekturer som Lakehouse och Data Lakes. Vi tror också att du har vana att arbeta i molnmiljöer som Azure, AWS eller GCP, och att du har koll på IAM, nätverk och säkerhet i en dataingenjörskontext.
   

  

 🔹 Flerårig erfarenhet av produktion och drift av dataflöden
   

  

 🔹 Goda kunskaper inom datamodellering, SQL och dataarkitektur
   

  

 🔹 Du är trygg i att ta tekniskt ledarskap och att stötta kollegor
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har jobbat med Databricks, Terraform, Kubernetes, Airflow eller realtidsdata. Har du dessutom erfarenhet från reglerade miljöer, som offentlig sektor eller finans, så är det ett plus men inte ett krav.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar även med Ljung & Sjöberg för en proaktiv arbetsplats kopplat till alkohol och droger.
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Biomedicinsk analytiker till lung- och allergiforskning
description:
Vill du bidra till att förbättra människors hälsa?
   

  

 Vi söker nu en biomedicinsk analytiker till vår kliniska forskningsenhet. Om du är engagerad, har gedigen erfarenhet av klinisk och/eller translationell forskning, så kan detta vara din nästa utmaning. Välkommen att bli en del av vårt team och bidra till framtidens medicinska framsteg!
   

  

 Beskrivning
   

  

 Med anledning av en kommande pensionsavgång behöver vi rekrytera en biomedicinsk analytiker till ’Klinisk Lung- och Allergiforskning, KI Campus Syd/Flemingsberg. Du blir en del av en forskargrupp där du kommer att ansvara för det laborativa genomförandet av forskningsstudier i nära samarbete med två forskningssjuksköterskor samt kliniska forskare och doktorander. Gruppen samarbetar också tätt med prekliniska forskare och annan personal på KI, samt internationellt.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 I dina arbetsuppgifter ingår bland annat:
   

  

* Laboratorieansvar på Klinisk Lung- och Allergiforskning
* Laborativ hantering av kliniska provmaterial från patienter och friska frivilliga (blod, urin, saliv, sputum och utandningsprover) vilket inkluderar olika former av provbearbetning, alikvotering, och nedfrysning till biobank
* Hantering av prover vid forskningsbronkoskopi inklusive blodprover, biopsier, sköljvätska, och borstprover
* Medverkan till biokemiska, immunologiska och histologiska analyser
* Utveckling och uppdatering av laborativa manualer och protokoll
* Hantering av data i databaser och studiedokument
* Hantering och organisation av biobanksprover i frysar eller andra lager
* Hantering av provförsändelser till samarbetspartners i Sverige och utomlands
* Ta fram underlag för försändelser av prover (MTA, Material Transfer Agreement).
* Deltagande i studiemöten för genomgång av forskningsresultat, i Sverige och utomlands
* Årlig kemikalieinventering


 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har betydande erfarenhet inom klinisk och/eller translationell forskning. Du är flexibel, noggrann, kvalitetsinriktad och har god organisationsförmåga. Du söker ett stort eget ansvarstagande samt uppskattar teamarbete. Du blir en viktig person i ett lagarbete inom en grupp som driver många och omväxlande projekt vilka bl. a. inkluderar samarbete med kliniska forskare och grundforskare såväl vid KI och inom Regionen, som nationellt och internationellt. Detta kräver god kommunikationsförmåga i både skrift och tal.
   

  

 Kunskap om lagar och förordningar som reglerar forskningsstudier är meriterande, liksom kunskap om GCP (Good Clinical Practice). Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet. Då arbetet sker inom en internationell forskningsmiljö är goda kunskaper i engelska en fördel, liksom god IT-kompetens.
   

  

 Vad erbjuder vi?
   

  

 En kreativ, internationell och inspirerande miljö fylld av kompetens och nyfikenhet. Karolinska Institutet är ett av världens ledande medicinska universitet. Vår vision är att driva utvecklingen av kunskap om livet och verka för en bättre hälsa för alla. Här bedriver vi framgångsrik medicinsk forskning och har det största utbudet av medicinska utbildningar i Sverige. Som universitet är Karolinska Institutet en statlig myndighet. Det gör att du får goda förmåner genom vårt kollektivavtal. Medarbetare på KI erbjuds också möjlighet till ett flexibelt arbetssätt. Det innebär att om den verksamhet du jobbar i tillåter, så kan du arbeta en del av din arbetstid på distans. Du får även träna fritt i våra moderna friskvårdsanläggningar där utbildad personal finns på plats.
   

  

**Placering:** 
 Flemingsberg
   

  

*Läs mer: Tio anledningar att arbeta på KI*
 Läs mer om Medicinska institutionen, Huddinge (MedH) och Centrum för Infektionsmedicin (CIM)
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan senast den 27 februari 2026.
   

  

 Ansökan ska göras via rekryteringssystemet Varbi. I denna rekrytering söker du med ditt CV utan personligt brev. I ansökningsformuläret kommer du istället att få svara på några frågor om varför du söker jobbet.
   

  

 Vid tillsvidareanställning tillämpar Karolinska Institutet 6 månaders provanställning.
   

  

 Vill du göra skillnad – och bidra till en bättre hälsa för alla? Sök jobb hos oss!
   

  

 Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% | Ort: Flemingsberg | Län: Stockholms län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: STÖD 2-408/2026 | Kontakt: Jenny Mjösberg, Rekryterande Chef Jenny.mjosberg@ki.se, Fredrika Aronsson, HR Partner Fredrika.aronsson@ki.se, | Facklig företrädare: Peter Svensson, SACO peter.svensson@ki.se, Mari Gilljam, OFR mari.gilljam@ki.se, Elizabeth Valenzuela, SEKO elizabeth.valenzuela@ki.se, | Publicerat: 2026-01-28 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-02-27

title: Product Engineer to Gazella
description:
*Do you want to help shape the future of recruitment? As a Product Engineer at Gazella, you’ll build cutting-edge AI systems that become the core of how modern companies hire. Working in a small, senior team, you’ll own the entire journey - from the first spark of an idea to a live, scalable solution.*
**About The Job**
 This service is a direct recruitment, which means that the recruitment process takes place through Bravura and you are employed directly by Gazella.
   

  

**About The Company**
 Gazella is developing an AI-first recruitment platform built entirely around autonomous agents, intelligent automation and retrievalbased systems. Instead of adding AI features on top of a traditional product, Gazella’s architecture is built from the ground up with AI as the foundation.
   

  

 With over 70 employees, Gazella combines fast execution and short decision paths with the stability of a profitable company that already has real users and strong distribution. You will join a compact product team consisting of the CTO, two engineers and one designer. The team works closely, iterates quickly and prioritizes clarity and impact over complexity.
   

  

**Tasks And Responsibilities**
 As a Product Engineer at Gazella, you work across the entire product lifecycle - from identifying opportunities to shipping production-ready solutions. The role is fullstack and handson, but also heavily product driven. You will talk to recruiters and clients, understand their problems, design AI powered workflows and build systems that automate core recruitment processes such as matching, screening and communication.
   

  

 AI is integrated at every layer. You will work with internal agents, RAG pipelines, reasoning systems and data retrieval setups that support decisionmaking at scale. You also collaborate directly with the CTO and influence both technical and product direction.
   

  

 You are expected to take ownership, use AI tools to accelerate development and iterate fast based on real usage data. This role is not about maintaining legacy code - it is about creating leverage through intelligent systems.
   

  

**Examples Of Responsibilities**
* Own product initiatives from initial idea to production release
* Design and build AI-driven workflows using RAG, agents and automation
* Collaborate with users and stakeholders to understand needs
* Develop fullstack features using Gazella’s application stack
* Improve matching, decision and retrieval systems
* Experiment, measure impact and iterate based on insights


**Education, Experience And Personal Characteristics**
* Experience with fullstack development
* Ability to work across product, design and engineering
* Comfortable building independently and owning endtoend solutions
* Experience working with TypeScript, JavaScript or similar modern languages


**It Is Also Meritorious If You Have**
* Experience with AI-driven systems, agents, LLM integrations or RAG
* Experience with React (Next.js), Node.js, tRPC, Kysely or PostgreSQL
* Experience working in small product teams or fast-moving environments
* Fluent speaking and writing skills in Swedish


 Gazella cares less about how many years you’ve worked and more about how you think. They look for someone who moves quickly, reasons clearly and enjoys taking responsibility throughout the entire development process.
   

  

**Gazella Looks For People With**
* High energy
* High intelligence
* High integrity


**You Are Likely Someone Who**
* Thinks in systems
* Learns extremely fast
* Enjoys ambiguity and finding clarity
* Cares about business outcomes and user value
* Ships without waiting for permission
* Feels comfortable working alongside AI agents


 You might have three years of experience.
   

  

 You might have twelve.
   

  

 What matters is how you reason, how you move and what you build.
   

  

**Other Information**
**Start:** 
 According to agreement
   

  

**Location:** 
 Gazella, Västra Järnvägsgatan 23, Stockholm (Hybrid)
   

  

**Salary:** 
 According to agreement
   

  

 We use a competency-based method in all recruitment processes to ensure unbiased selection. We also work with ongoing selection, which means that we’ll take down the job ad when enough candidates have reached the final steps of the process.
   

  

 If you are considered for the position, we will contact you for an initial interview. Regardless of whether you proceed in the process or not, you will receive feedback on your application.
   

  

 If you have questions about the service or about your application, you are welcome to contact our support by emailing info@bravura.se or calling 010-171 47 10 and we will help you. Please indicate which service it applies to.
   

  

 We recommend that you submit your application immediately as we make a continuous selection.
   

  

 Welcome with your application!
   

  

*#Brillante*

title: Advisor
description:
**Beskrivning av rollen** 





 Detta är en heltidsroll i Stockholm. Som rådgivare på Radar Group kommer du att samarbeta med kunder för att leverera skräddarsydda insikter och strategisk vägledning.
 
 Du är en del av ett team vetgiriga experter som levererar datadrivna insikter till beslutsfattare i hela IT-ekosystemet. Rådgivningsuppdragen sträcker sig från dagslånga uppdrag som presentationer och workshops till ledning eller styrelse till att ta fram beslutsunderlag, marknadsrapporter eller uppdrag inom strategiutveckling och IT-styrning. Som rådgivare jobbar du ofta med flera mindre och större uppdrag parallellt inom en rad olika ämnesområden. Kundkontakt är en stor och viktig del av din roll, men som rådgivare är du inte placerad ute hos kunder utan jobbar tillsammans med ditt team och dina Radarkollegor i dina uppdrag.
 



  





*Arbetsuppgifter för en rådgivare inkluderar bland annat* 



* Projektledning
* Analys av data till insikter
* Presentation eller talare på event, ledningsgruppsmöte, styrelsemöte, etc.
* Producera material såsom beslutsunderlag, rapporter, presentationer, etc.
* Delta i datainsamling såsom intervjuer
* Presale/säljstöd av projekt man sedan ingår i



  





  





**Vem passar i rollen** 




 För att lyckas i rådgivningsrollen är personliga egenskaper generellt sett viktigare än formella kvalifikationer.
 



  





 Meriterande erfarenhet inkluderar
 


* *Branschkunskap inom IT.* 
 En av pelarna som underbygger Radars leveranser är industriell expertis. För att vinna förtroende hos kunder och kunna leverera analyser och rådgivning på hög nivå krävs kunskap inom IT och tech.
* *Erfarenhet av att jobba som eller med beslutsfattare.* 
 Radars målgrupp är seniora beslutsfattare. Som rådgivare kommer du att arbeta mot VD, IT-chef, CISO, digitaliseringsdirektör, affärsområdeschef och liknande. Som rådgivare behöver du vara bekväm i dessa sammanhang och strategiskt kunna brygga frågor mellan IT och verksamhet/affär.



  





 Personliga egenskaper
 


* *Lagspelare* 
 . Rådgivningsuppdrag bygger på teamleveranser där du jobbar tillsammans med andra. Som person tycker du om att samarbeta och förstår att fler perspektiv bygger en bättre helhet. Som rådgivare är du en representant för Radars analyser snarare än att bygga enskilda konsultprofiler.
* *Nyfiken* 
 . Radar vill alltid skapa aktuella och relevanta analyser. Med en omvärld och teknisk utveckling i ständig förändring drivs du av att hela tiden få utvecklas och lära dig nya saker.
* *Prestigelös* 
 . För att kunna ligga i framkant och utmana med nya insikter är det viktigt att också våga vara okunnig och våga fråga. Alla idéer är välkomna, men inget är heligt. När vi bygger våra analyser kommer mängder av idéer att kastas upp och skjutas ner, och det bör inte tolkas som personlig kritik utan är en del av den kreativa processen. En person som är trygg i sig själv och kan se till slutresultatets bästa snarare än personlig status kommer att passa bättre i sådana sammanhang.
* *Trivs med förändring.* 
 Med många korta och ofta parallella uppdrag trivs du i att hoppa mellan kunder, uppdrag och ämnesområden. Att tolka och förstå förändring är en del av Radars DNA, och som rådgivare ser du en sån miljö som utvecklande snarare än utmanande.
* *Analytiskt stark.* 
 Du har en tydlig datadriven approach och är trygg i att arbeta med strukturerade analysmetoder, från datainsamling och kvalitetssäkring till tolkning, slutsatser och rekommendationer som går att agera på.
 
 Du förstår värdet av jämförelser och kan arbeta med benchmarkingmodeller, best practice och verktyg för komparativa analyser för att identifiera gap, möjligheter och prioriterade initiativ.
* *Kommunikativ och pedagogisk.* 
 Du kan paketera det ibland komplexa och presentera det med tydlighet och pondus i rapporter, workshops och kunddialoger. Du anpassar budskapet efter målgrupp och kontext. Detta på såväl svenska som engelska.



  





  





**Företagsbeskrivning** 




 Radar Group tillhandahåller datadrivna insikter och strategisk rådgivning till IT-branschen på både global och lokal nivå. Genom att utnyttja alla datapunkter som samlas in via företagets egna, proprietära metoder hjälper Radar intressenter i IT-ekosystemet att fatta mer välgrundade och smartare beslut. Med ett nätverk på över 14 000 medlemmar i Norden erbjuder Radar sina kunder tillgång till en exklusiv Insight Hub med rapporter, benchmarkingmodeller, best practice och verktyg som stödjer tillväxt och strategi. Radar är känt som en betrodd partner, och företagets erfarna strategiska rådgivare levererar handlingsbara insikter som stärker genomslag och marknadstillväxt.

title: Content Moderator
description:
**Important: This position requires relocation to Thessaloniki, Greece. Relocation assistance is offered.** 




  





**Content Moderation - Bilingual Swedish/English** 




**Thessaloniki, Greece** 




**Full Time (Permanent)** 




**Full relocation offered** 




  





**About TaskUs** 




 TaskUs is a provider of outsourced digital services and next-generation customer experience to fast-growing technology companies, helping its clients represent, protect and grow their brands. Leveraging a cloud-based infrastructure, TaskUs serves clients in fastest-growing sectors, including social media, e-commerce, gaming, streaming media, food delivery, ride-sharing, HiTech, FinTech, and HealthTech.
 



  





 The People First culture at TaskUs has enabled the company to expand its workforce to approximately 45,000 employees globally. Presently, we have a presence in twenty-three locations across twelve countries, which include the Philippines, India, and the United States. It started with one ridiculously good idea to create a different breed of Business Processing Outsourcing (BPO).
 



 We at TaskUs understand that achieving growth for our partners requires a culture of constant motion, exploring new technologies, being ready to handle any challenge at a moment’s notice, and mastering consistency in an ever-changing world.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 At TaskUs, we prioritize our employees' well-being by offering competitive industry salaries and comprehensive benefits packages.
 **Our commitment to growth includes offering full relocation assistance for this role in Thessaloniki.** 
 Our People First culture is reflected in the various departments we have established, including Total Rewards, Wellness, HR, and Diversity. We take pride in our inclusive environment and positive impact on the community. Moreover, we actively encourage internal mobility and professional growth at all stages of an employee's career within TaskUs. Join our team today and experience firsthand our dedication to supporting People First.
 



  





**So what does a Content Moderator really do?** 




 Think of yourself as someone who will ensure high-quality and safe experiences for both people and businesses across the social media family of apps.
 



  





 As a Content Moderator, you will be instrumental in keeping our online world engaging, appropriate, and safe. You will apply content policies to digital content and execute handling procedures with consistency. The best candidates can identify subtle differences in the meaning of digital communication and accurately enforce the client’s terms of use by carefully monitoring reports of abuse.
 



  





**Your day-to-day will involve:** 



* Reviewing digital content such as videos, news stories, still pictures, political ads, and social media profiles.
* Scoring content based on age-appropriateness, level of violence, sexual content, and political transparency.
* Actively participating in employee assistance programs and wellness initiatives.
* Escalating changes that may impact performance or KPIs through the appropriate channels.
* Adhering to strict security measures, confidentiality, and project requirements.



  





 At TaskUs, you understand the importance of working hard and having fun! You will be given daily time to participate in wellness activities such as dance parties, fitness challenges, video games, and team development exercises. We provide onsite free munchies and popcorn, and we always enjoy a good party!
 



  





**Requirements: Do you have what it takes?** 



* **Experience:** 
 Preferred but not essential to have one year of prior operations experience in shared services or a customer experience environment.
* **Education:** 
 High school diploma or equivalent.
* **Language:** 
 Must be fluent in
 **English and Swedish** 
 (reading, writing, and speaking).
* **Skills:** 
 Strong interpersonal skills, verbal/written communication, and, most importantly, empathy.
* **Awareness:** 
 A high affinity and cultural awareness of political and social situations regarding the relevant market and region.



  





**Wellness & Resilience** 




 TaskUs devotes considerable resources to the wellbeing of its employees. Being a Content Moderator means participating in mandatory wellness programs:
 


* **Wellness Coaching:** 
 Sessions to ensure awareness of resources and job adjustment.
* **Wellness Groups:** 
 Regular participation in peer support and resiliency training.



  





**Creating a Culture of Awareness:** 




 We believe in transparency regarding the possible impact of this role. Some campaigns include disturbing content, such as child exploitation, animal torture, gang violence, murder, and hate speech. While we provide on-site counselors and resiliency programming, exposure to this content is unavoidable. Some individuals may be at risk for developing distress or mental health symptoms; therefore, our Resiliency and Wellness Team takes an active role in primary prevention and outreach.
 



  





**About Us** 




 TaskUs is the fastest-growing tech-enabled business services company in the world, delivering customer support, AI operations, and content security services. Listed as one of Glassdoor‘s “100 Best Places to Work” and recognized by Inc. 5000 for seven consecutive years, TaskUs is a Frontline-First company. Founded in 2008, the company now has over 47,000 employees across the U.S., Philippines, India, Taiwan, Croatia, and Mexico.
 



  





**TaskUs Inc. is an equal opportunity employer.** 
*TaskUs will never solicit money or payment during the application process. Ensure you are communicating only with authorized recruiters.* 




  





**DEI:** 
 We welcome applicants of all backgrounds. If you need reasonable accommodations during the hiring process, please let us know.
 



  





 https://taskus.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/Careers/job/Thessaloniki-Greece/Content-Moderation---Bilingual-Swedish-English\_R\_2601\_329

title: Total Rewards Analyst
description:
**Job Description**

 As a Total Rewards Analyst, you will act as a trusted expert in data management, reporting, and insights. You will be a key contributor to the successful execution of core rewards programs, deliver different types of compensation data analysis and prepare market and trend reporting. You will ensure the optimal use of the systems and tools used by Total Rewards and actively lead their updates and preparation for key rewards processes. As a Total Rewards Analyst, you will also secure data governance and ways of working within the area of total rewards by delivering documentation and working procedures for used systems and data management. Through impactful reporting, data analysis, and visually compelling presentations, you will translate insights into stories that support decision-making, enhance transparency, and drive better reward outcomes across the organization.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 Foundational:
   

  




* Drive the total rewards agenda for systems and data, by leading various initiatives in the area, securing global multi-brand and multi-function reach.
* Support in various compensation related projects on a need basis through partnership and collaboration.
* Responsible for creating and maintaining compensation and job-related tools, master files and data inventories.
* Support technical or analytical rewards deliveries to the wider HR community, upon request.



 Data, Reporting & Analytics:
   

  




* Audit and analyse external and internal market data, trends, and insights to provide proactive Total Reward advice to business leaders and HR.
* Facilitate data preparation and provides support for Global Role framework review and calibration exercises across the Group.
* Perform audits of job-related information in systems and initiates review or clean-up exercises. ·
* Perform regular audits and analysis of employee compensation to ensure regulatory compliance and internal equity across positions.



 Annual Cycle Activities:
   

  




* Create and update working templates, compensation models and systems required for the implementation of key rewards deliverables as the Annual Salary Review process, Salary Increase Budget process, Salary Structures creation, etc.
* Process large amounts of data and perform internal employee and external market compensation data analysis during key rewards processes as market benchmarking, survey submission, market data analysis, salary structure reviews, internal equity analysis.



 Systems:
   

  




* Act as a super-user for all systems and tools used for total rewards deliveries.
* Take a leading role during technical set-up for the Annual Salary Review and other key rewards processes.
* Initiate system updates to secure global consistency.
* Secure that salary setting principles are embedded into systems, processes, and ways of working.
* Develop guidelines and ways of working with systems, data and rewards tools.
* Communicate those to total rewards, managers, and HR community where relevant and facilitate trainings on topics concerning systems and data.
* Provide systems and analytical support to other Total Rewards Managers and Specialists as required, within several areas of total rewards.
* Research and facilitate implementation of new system functionalities, rewards insights and analytics, dashboards, and reports to improve colleague experience and HR and Leaders capabilities.
* Support audits and general quality assurance processes.



 Compliance:
   

  




* Drive Group governance and compliance by securing proper and updates instructions, frameworks, processes and governance of compensation and employee data.
* Keep well-informed and maintain overview of all current and pending local laws and regulations that pertains to compensation and ensures compliance.



**WHO YOU'LL WORK WITH**




 As a Total Rewards Analyst you will be part of the Central People Organization of H&M Group, and will report to Manager Rewards. You will work in close collaboration with Rewards Experts and other Total Rewards Analysts in the team and will engage with the broader global rewards community.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for people with:
   

  




* Bachelor’s Degree in information technologies, data sciences, statistics, economics, engineering, or related discipline is required.
* Minimum 2 years’ experience of working with data, analytics and reporting, process automations, or systems.
* Experience of having worked with business and employee data, preferably HR Reporting and Analytics.
* Strong proficiency in working with large amounts of data and presenting results, advanced Excel Skills, including Power Pivot, Power Query.
* Very good knowledge of MS 365, experienced Power BI user
* Experience with Workday, SuccessFactors, SAP, Cornerstone or other HRM System.
* Analytical and numerical skills. Data storytelling and the ability to translate data analyses into understandable terms in order to influence a business decision or action.
* Ability to effectively handle numerous tasks simultaneously within time constraints
* Written and verbal communication skills
* Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
* Planning & Organizing skills
* Ability to work in a team or independently on assigned projects.
* Ability to deal with ambiguity while juggling multiple priorities.
* Strong attention to detail, and ability to work with highly sensitive and confidential material.


**Additional Information**

**WHO WE ARE** 
 ​
   

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 ​We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





**​WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
 ​
   

  





 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





**JOIN US​** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 ​Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





 ​
 *\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​*

title: Principal Electrical Engineer
description:
Working at CorPower Ocean you will be part of a world class team, determined to make big impact. We are on a mission to Power the Planet with clean electricity from ocean waves. We offer autonomy and flexibility, combined with personal responsibility. CorPower Ocean is a global leader in wave energy, with a technology that has shown game-changing performance. Your work will contribute to the global energy transition by unlocking one of the largest untapped sources of clean energy on earth. Since the start in 2012 CorPower has raised more than 115mEUR to bring our technology to market, supporting a growing commercial project pipeline.
 



  





  





**Role** 




 As a Principal Electrical Engineer at Corpower Ocean, you will provide technical leadership across the design, analysis, manufacturing, testing and certification across all electrical systems and subsystems of the wave energy converter (WEC) and CorPack technologies. Working closely with the Chief Engineer and CTO, you will use your strong grasp of fundamentals and industrial electrical engineering experience to support and guide the delivery of the critical electrical powertrain and grid connected systems.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




*Technical Leadership* 



* Perform electrical system design work including power system analysis
* Be a principal technical authority on electrical engineering in the company and work with Electrical Group Lead
* Drive the team towards well-rounded technical solutions based on performance, safety, standards, cost and function
* Establish requirements for subsystems and components in electrical engineering, and interfacing areas
* Investigate new solutions to improve performance, reliability and cost



  





*Project Delivery and Qualification* 



* Develop and review key deliverables including SLD’s, routing, load lists, protection studies, I/O lists and fieldbus design
* Ensure system compliance with marine and renewable standards from IEC and DNV
* Oversee full design lifecycle – from concept to detailed design, manufacturing, testing and commissioning
* Support supply chain activities including component and supplier selection, factory acceptance testing
* Support assembly, testing, troubleshooting and root-cause analysis of electrical systems in the field



  





*Teamwork and Mentorship* 



* Liaise with Chief Engineer, CTO and coordinate with other teams including mechanical, systems, control, marine and more
* Mentor team members in fostering technical growth, best practices and tackling technical challenges
* Support risk assessments, FMECA and reliability analyses across the team



  





*Technology Roadmap* 



* Keep up to date on technical state of the art, standards and design/cost improvement opportunities
* Contribute to company’s product roadmap and R&D strategy for next-generation wave energy
* Enable scalability from prototype to commercial systems



  





  





**Qualifications and skills** 




  




* BSc or a MSc degree in electrical engineering or related discipline
* Minimum of 15 years of relevant electrical engineering experience
* Experience with a variety of electrical systems including Generators, Inverters, Batteries for grid applications, Control and Communication Systems.
* Experience with DNV certification is preferred. Other application-specific certification experience is meriting (e.g. aerospace, automotive)
* Experience with Inverter Based Resources (IBR) grid connection and compliance processes
* Experience with DC Distribution design
* Experience with Medium or High Voltage Systems, and related personnel safety
* Experience in Electrical Safety of Machinery
* Experience in Marine Environment applications.
* Experience with subsea electrical applications is meriting



  





  





**As a person, you:** 



* are striving for excellence, put quality into everything you do
* are self-motivated and constantly seek the most efficient ways to work
* search for simple and sustainable solutions to difficult problems
* love to learn new things, and take pride in constantly developing your skills
* are persistent, knowing it takes stamina to reach pioneering goals
* see your tasks through to completion
* are comfortable in presenting your solutions internally and externally
* are data driven and strive to always back your points with solid analysis



  





 CorPower Ocean has a diverse team with many nationalities and backgrounds, all working towards the same goal: To Powe the Planet with clean energy from ocean waves.

title: Change Management Professional
description:
Are you driven by the challenge of turning strategy into real change? At Sandvik Coromant, change is a key enabler of innovation – and this role plays a central part in making it stick!
   

  

**Why Sandvik Coromant?**
 We offer you the opportunity to influence how change happens in a global, technology-driven organization where innovation is part of DNA. Joining us, you get to:
   

  

* Work close to senior leaders and help shape strategic initiatives within R&D.
* Make a visible impact by driving adoption, not just delivery.
* Grow in a global environment that values trust, collaboration, and continuous improvement.


**About The Job**
 In this role, strategic change initiatives within R&D are driven from idea to lasting adoption. Your focus is on ensuring that transformation delivers real business value – not only on paper, but in how people work every day. Acting as a trusted advisor, senior leaders are supported in their role as change sponsors, while R&D’s overall change capabilities continue to evolve.
   

  

 You own and develop selected change management practices, governance models, and cross-functional processes, ensuring consistency, measurement, and continuous improvement. External trends and best practices in change leadership are monitored and translated into relevant insights for our organization. You act in a matrix organization with broad stakeholder interaction.
   

  

 Included in your responsibilities:
   

  

* Lead complex, cross-functional initiatives using agile and iterative principles, with clear outcomes and measurable results.
* Engage stakeholders across R&D and related functions to secure alignment and buy-in.
* Assess organizational readiness, identifying adoption risks and defining actions to address behavioral and cultural barriers.


**Location and flexibility**
 The position is based in Sandviken or Stockholm, with flexibility to work in a hybrid setup.
   

  

**Your profile**
 You have a strong foundation in change management and organizational transformation in technology-intensive environments such as R&D, engineering, or product development. Experience translating strategy into sustainable ways of working is essential, as is the ability to influence senior stakeholders without formal authority. You communicate clearly in English, both verbally and in writing, and are comfortable navigating ambiguity while keeping momentum. To be successful and enjoy this role, you need:
   

  

* Solid knowledge of change management methodologies, governance, and adoption measurement.
* Strong analytical skills and the ability to turn complexity into clear direction.
* Experience working cross-functionally in matrix organizations.


 Your soft skills matter just as much as experience. You build trust through integrity and credibility, challenges leaders constructively, and remain resilient when change becomes complex. A collaborative mindset, curiosity and the ability to mobilize others goes a long way.
   

  

**Some Words About Us**
 To us, innovation isn’t just a concept – it’s how we move manufacturing forward together with customers, partners, and colleagues across the globe. Within R&D, collaboration is close, expectations are high, and ideas are encouraged to travel across boundaries.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We believe in an inclusive, equal and open-minded culture, and we nurture our diversities to form a solid foundation for achieving great results. Add fair and rewarding benefits, as well as many different career opportunities in an inspiring global environment. Meet some of your future colleagues at our career page or visit our website, LinkedIn or Facebook page to get to know us further.
   

  

**Contact information**
 Are you curious to know more about this position? Please contact Per-Ola Hadin, hiring manager, at per-ola.hadin@sandvik.com
   

  

 We’ve already decided on which advertising channels and marketing campaigns we wish to use and respectfully decline any additional contacts in that matter.
   

  

 Union contacts (Sweden):
   

  

* Robert Brandt, Unionen, +46 (0)70-261 36 19
* Tord Engström, Akademikerföreningen, +46 (0)76 106 62 87
* Peter Olsson-Andrée, Ledarna, +46 (0)70-222 48 55


 Recruitment Specialist: Anton Karlsson
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Send your application no later than March 15th, 2026. Click apply and include your resume and cover letter in English. Please note that we don’t accept applications by e-mail. Job ID: R0088066.
   

  

 To learn more about our recruitment process, please visit our career site or contact HR Services at hrservices.sweden@sandvik.com

title: QA Automation Engineer
description:
Paligo is a fast-growing SaaS scale-up offering an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) trusted by global organizations. With 80+ people, 450+ customers across 38 countries, and a culture grounded in innovation, we’re on a mission to become the leading platform for structured content. This role is based in our Solna headquarters in Stockholm and reports to the Engineering Manager.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 Paligo is looking for a
 **QA Automation Engineer** 
 to play a central role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our products. At its core, this role is about quality control; it’s about designing the frameworks and strategies that allow us to scale with confidence.
   

  

 This is a hands-on role where you will design, implement, and execute effective testing strategies. You won’t just follow a script, you will collaborate closely with Developers, Product Management, and stakeholders to define what quality looks like at Paligo. Whether you are building automated frameworks from scratch or performing manual deep-dives, you find energy in the "hunt" for hidden issues and the satisfaction of a seamless release.
   

  

 The right person thrives in SaaS scale-ups, moves fast, and values high-fidelity collaboration. While we offer flexibility, the heart of our teamwork happens in our Solna office, where we emphasize in-person synergy to solve complex technical challenges.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strategy & Implementation: Design and implement both manual and automated test strategies to secure quality throughout the entire development cycle.
* Framework Development: Build, enhance, and maintain automated testing frameworks from the ground up, with a heavy focus on end-to-end (E2E) testing.
* Efficiency & Tooling: Utilize modern testing tools (like Playwright) and methodologies to maximize test efficiency and coverage.
* Cross-functional Collaboration: Partner closely with developers and product managers to identify potential risks early and ensure high-quality, timely releases.
* Bug Advocacy: Identify, document, and track bugs to resolution, acting as the final gatekeeper for the user experience.
* Continuous Improvement: Evaluate internal QA processes and incorporate feedback to continuously sharpen our workflows and output performance.


**What You Bring**
**Must-haves**
* The QA Mindset: A curious, innovative, and detail-oriented approach. You have a knack for finding the "edge cases" others miss.
* Experience: 3+ years in software quality assurance within a software development environment (preferably B2B SaaS/Cloud).
* Technical Proficiency: Proven experience developing automated test frameworks and strong familiarity with general web technologies.
* Tooling Expertise: Deep knowledge of QA methodologies and tools like Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium.
* Communication: Native or professional fluency in English with the ability to collaborate across functions and cultures.
* Agentic Development Familiarity: A solid understanding of agentic development workflows, including experience (or strong interest) in how AI agents can be leveraged to assist in code generation, test maintenance, or autonomous bug discovery.


**Nice-to-haves**
* Working proficiency in Swedish.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and integrating automated testing into the deployment flow.


**What You’ll Focus On**
* E2E Automation Coverage: Driving the expansion of end-to-end automated test coverage across both legacy features and new releases, ensuring critical user paths are consistently validated.
* Stability: Reduction in production incidents and bugs related to insufficient testing.
* QA Cycle Efficiency: Optimizing the speed and effectiveness of quality assurance within the sprint, ensuring that the testing phase accelerates rather than hinders the release of new features.
* Process Evolution: Tangible improvements in testing efficiency and the scaling of QA workflows.


**Why join us**
 At Paligo, you’ll be at the heart of a global company transitioning from startup to scale-up. Your work directly impacts how global enterprises manage their most mission-critical knowledge.
   

  

* Impact: Build a QA function from the ground up in a company leading its category.
* Growth: A dedicated Professional Development budget to keep you at the cutting edge of testing technology.
* Culture: A collaborative, hybrid work model in brand-new modern offices in Solna, grounded in ownership and curiosity.
* Stability & Perks: Competitive compensation, wellness allowances, parental leave contributions, and a healthy "fika" culture.


**About Paligo**
 Paligo was founded in 2015 and is an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) trusted by global organizations to create, manage, and deliver technical documentation and knowledge management content. With over 450 customers across 38 countries, our mission is to empower teams to turn knowledge into an asset anywhere and anytime.
   

  

 Paligo is an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) solution for technical documentation, policies and procedures, knowledge management, and more.

title: Underhållsplanerare
description:
På Nabo skapar vi
 **Sveriges bästa bostadsrättsföreningar** 
 . Bostaden är en av livets viktigaste investeringar, och vi gör det enklare att engagera sig i sitt boende genom datadriven förvaltning som stärker både ekonomi och trygghet. Med
 **350** 
**experter** 
 och smart teknik ger vi föreningar
 **bättre ekonomi, effektivare fastigheter och ett enklare styrelsearbete** 
 .
 



 Hos oss samarbetar
 **ekonomer, tekniska förvaltare, fastighetsskötare, jurister** 
 och andra specialister i modiga, kundfokuserade team som brinner för att göra förvaltningen
 **ännu enklare** 
**– tillsammans** 
 .
 



 På Nabo värdesätter vi våra medarbetare och investerar i deras utveckling. Vi erbjuder en arbetsplats där du kan växa och bidra med dina idéer i ett engagerat team. Vi är modiga och jobbar tillsammans mot tydliga mål, med stöd av inspirerande ledare.
 **Vi tror att tiden på Nabo kan bli en höjdpunkt i din karriär.** 
 Vill du sätta nya standarder och skapa samhällsnytta?
 **Kom och forma framtidens fastighetsförvaltning med oss.** 




  





**Om tjänsten:** 




 Vi söker nu underhållsplanerare till vårt kontor i Stockholm. Som Underhållsplanerare på Nabo agerar du rådgivare till våra kunder, bostadsrättsföreningarna i frågor som rör fastigheternas långsiktiga underhåll och investeringar. Du ansvarar för att ta fram, utveckla och följa upp underhållsplaner som skapar struktur, framförhållning och trygghet för styrelserna i föreningarna.
 



 Rollen är både analytisk och relationsskapande där du kombinerar byggteknisk förståelse med vara pedagogisk och vägleda kunderna i komplexa frågor rörande deras framtida underhållsbehov.
 



 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Upprätta, uppdatera och kvalitetssäkra underhållsplaner utifrån fastighetens skick och föreningens långsiktiga behov
* Genomföra fastighetsbesiktningar för att identifiera och dokumentera underhållsbehov
* Analysera och prioritera underhållsåtgärder samt rekommendera tidsplaner och budgetar
* Koordinera med entreprenörer och andra samarbetspartners för att säkerställa att underhållsarbeten utförs enligt plan
* Presentera och förklara underhållsplanerna för bostadsrättsföreningarnas styrelser.
* Stödja fastighetsägare och förvaltare med rådgivning kring underhållsfrågor och långsiktiga investeringar
* Bidra till att utveckla arbetssätt och kvalitet inom underhållsplanering på Nabo



  





**Din bakgrund** 



* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom fastighet, bygg, teknik eller motsvarande
* God förståelse för fastighetsteknik och byggnadsskötsel
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta rådgivande mot kund, exempelvis styrelser eller fastighetsägare
* God IT-vana, vi arbetar i Planima och Office-miljön
* Kan kommunicera obehindrat i både tal och skrift på svenska
* B-körkort
* Har du erfarenhet av fastighetsförvaltning, bygg- eller teknisk administration är det starkt meriterande
* Erfarenhet av att upprätta underhållsplaner är meriterande
* Kunskap inom fastighetsjuridik och entreprenadavtal är meriterande



  





**Personliga egenskaper** 




 Vi tror att du som söker denna roll är en strukturerad, analytisk person med en en god förmåga att se både helheten och detaljerna i ditt arbete. Du bygger goda kundrelationer genom din förmåga att kommunicera tydligt och skapa förtroende hos kunder och samarbetspartners. Vi söker en lösningsorienterad och framåtlutad person som drivs av att säkerställa att fastigheter underhålls på ett hållbart och kostnadseffektivt sätt.
 



  





**Vad händer framåt** 




 Vi arbetar löpande med våra rekryteringsprocesser. Detta betyder att vi går igenom ansökningarna från att de kommer in. Kommande steg i processen om du går vidare består av intervjuer, bakgrundskontroll\* samt referenstagning.
 



*\* Slutkandidater kommer efter sitt godkännande att omfattas av en bakgrundskontroll.*

title: Senior Performance Marketer
description:
**Paligo** 
 is the leading cloud-based component content management system (CCMS) for technical documentation. We help teams create, manage, translate, and publish structured content at scale, with 450+ customers across 38 countries.
   

  

 This role is based in Stockholm and reports to the VP of Marketing.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 Search is changing fast. AI Mode, zero-click results, and LLM-driven research are rewriting the rules of B2B discovery. We're looking for a
 **Senior Performance Marketer** 
 who sees this shift as an opportunity. Someone who can own our traffic acquisition, optimize conversions on our site, and make sure Paligo shows up wherever our buyers are looking.
   

  

 This role owns the full spectrum: organic, paid and AI search, affiliate partnerships, and paligo.net itself. You'll drive targeted traffic, optimize how visitors convert, and continuously test and iterate to fuel a high-velocity sales pipeline.
   

  

 This is both strategic and hands-on. You'll shape our SEO and SEM capabilities for today's rapidly evolving search landscape while also building the site, managing budgets, and measuring what moves the needle, every single day. At Paligo all team members roll up their sleeves and do the work. You'll collaborate closely with our Marketing Manager, Content Writer, Revenue Operations team, and Digital Designer.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Traffic acquisition**
* Build and optimize our organic search program, including technical SEO, content strategy, and authority building to improve rankings and capture high-intent traffic.
* Develop and execute our AI search visibility strategy. Research and optimize how Paligo is cited and recommended through Google, Claude, ChatGPt etc.
* Run paid search campaigns across Google and Microsoft Ads. Manage budgets, optimize bids, and drive efficient cost-per-lead.
* Manage and develop affiliate partnerships with industry influencers and organizations.


**Website & conversion optimization**
* Own Paligo's website end to end. Build and optimize pages, improve conversion rates, and continuously test and iterate to turn traffic into Marketing Qualified Leads (MQLs).
* Shape the on-site experience in collaboration with Digital Design, from landing pages to CTAs over the entire visitor journey.
* Measure what matters: report on performance across all channels, build attribution models, and use data to prioritize where to invest next.


**Growth opportunities**
* For the right person: take ownership of our ABM program and level up how marketing supports outbound.
* Experiment with emerging channels and formats as the search landscape evolves. This role has the mandate to test, learn, and scale what works.
* Shape Paligo's approach to AI-driven discovery as a competitive advantage. This is a space where best practices are still being written.


**What You Bring**
**Must-haves**
* A genuine curiosity about how AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini are reshaping how B2B buyers discover and evaluate software, and a drive to turn that understanding into competitive advantage.
* 7+ years of hands-on digital marketing experience in B2B SaaS, including proven results in driving traffic growth and improving conversion rates.
* Expertise in SEO and SEM (Google Ads, Microsoft Ads) for B2B audiences.
* Strong analytical and action-oriented mindset. Comfortable working with Google Analytics, Search Console, HubSpot reporting, and campaign attribution data to make decisions.
* Working proficiency in WordPress (or similar CMS) for building and optimizing web pages.


**Nice-to-haves**
* Experience with account-based marketing (ABM) programs.
* Familiarity with the creation of technical documentation, knowledge or content management.
* Experience working with agencies or freelancers to scale marketing output.


**What You'll Focus On (and Be Measured On)**
* Volume and quality of Marketing Qualified Leads (MQLs) generated across all channels and the resulting business opportunities.
* Paligo's visibility and citations in AI-driven search.
* Traffic growth across organic, paid, and AI-driven channels, and the efficiency of spend behind it.
* Website conversion rates and the quality of the on-site visitor experience.


**Why join us**
 At Paligo, your work directly shapes how a global SaaS company grows. You'll have real ownership, visible impact, and the support to do your best work.
   

  

* Own the full traffic and conversion engine for a company with strong product-market fit and room to grow.
* Shape how Paligo shows up in the next generation of search, including AI, LLMs, and beyond.
* A collaborative, remote-friendly culture grounded in ownership, curiosity, and real impact.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.


**About Paligo**
 Paligo was founded in 2015 and is an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) trusted by global organizations to create, manage, and deliver technical documentation, policies & procedures, and knowledge management content. Our customers include global enterprises like Emerson Electric, Washington Post, Alteryx, and Sitecore. Our mission is to empower teams to create, collaborate, and elevate, turning knowledge into an asset anywhere and anytime.
   

  

**Perks & Benefits**
* Flexible working hours, remote work / home office support
* Competitive pension, insurance (sick, life, occupational injury)
* Wellness allowance + gym at the Stockholm office
* Parental leave pay contribution (including pension benefits in first three months)
* Development opportunities: internal & external workshops, education support
* Social perks: breakfast, "fika" (Swedish coffee culture) and great colleagues!


 Paligo is an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) solution for technical documentation, policies and procedures, knowledge management, and more.

title: Strategic Business Development Representative (German or French speaking)
description:
**About The Role**
 As a Strategic BDR at Funnel, your mission is clear:
 **drive measurable pipeline through outbound prospecting while effectively qualifying and inbound opportunities** 
 . This role is not about activity for activity’s sake — it’s about performance. You will work on an enterprise target account list, engage with decision-makers with tailored outreach, and book qualified meetings that directly fuel revenue. Success here requires persistence, discipline, and a performance-first mindset.
   

  

 You’ll be on the front lines of growth, learning how Funnel creates value for marketers and analysts while gaining exposure to sales strategy, product positioning, and market engagement. This role offers a platform to sharpen commercial skills, build visibility across the business, and prove your ability to deliver results in a high-impact function.
   

  

**Mission Statement**
 Our mission is to
