title: Ingenjörer till Comatec Sweden – Göteborg
description:
**Vill du vara med och göra skillnad – och ha roligt på vägen?**


Hos oss på Comatec Sweden tror vi att konsultlivet ska vara både personligt, utvecklande och inspirerande. Vi är ett sammansvetsat team i Göteborg, med tryggheten och möjligheterna från den internationella Comatec Group i ryggen. Här får du det bästa av två världar: den familjära känslan och flexibiliteten från det lilla bolaget, och resurserna och tryggheten från en större koncern.


Vi samarbetar med allt från världsledande fordonsjättar till innovativa start-ups inom industri, mjukvara, automation, produktion, energi, elektronik och digitalisering. Som konsult hos oss matchas du mot spännande projekt där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad – ofta på plats hos kund, men alltid med stöd från Comatec-teamet.

**Vad gör oss unika?**  

Vi värdesätter äkta samarbete, kunskapsdelning och en varm, inkluderande kultur. Vi ses regelbundet för sociala aktiviteter, teknisk inspiration och för att fira våra framgångar tillsammans. Dina idéer och ambitioner är viktiga här – och du får friheten att forma din egen utveckling.


Om du söker en arbetsplats där du blir sedd, stöttad och utmanad – och där du kan växa både som ingenjör och människa – då vill vi gärna höra från dig!


www.comatec.fi/en/companies/comatec-sweden-ab/

 **Vi söker dig med erfarenhet inom :**

* Embedded systems
* Elektronik
* Elkraft
* Automation
* Produktionsteknik
* Systemutveckling
* Mjukvaruutveckling (C, C++, Python, Matlab/Simulink)
* Test & verifiering
* DevOps, CI/CD, Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes
* Projektledning
* Konstruktion
* Dataingenjör, AI, digitalisering
* Fordonsteknik, elektrifiering, ADAS, infotainment
* Hårdvarunära kod/utveckling, realtidssystem
* Kommunikation (CAN, LIN, Ethernet, SPI)


Har du annan relevant ingenjörsbakgrund är du också välkommen att söka.

**Vem är du?**


Du är ingenjör, har EU-medborgarskap eller arbetstillstånd i Sverige och vill arbeta på plats i Göteborg.

**Comatec Group**


Vi är ett internationellt ingenjörsföretag med cirka 600 engagerade experter på tjugo orter i Finland, Sverige, Polen, Estland och Rumänien. Vår styrka ligger i att leverera innovativ konstruktionsdesign, projektledning och specialisttjänster för teknikindustrin.

**Vi skapar värde i projekt som rör:**

* Mobila maskiner och kommersiella fordon
* Industriell automation och modernisering
* Materialhantering och produktionssystem
* Kraftverk och pannlösningar


Med en tydlig vision om tillväxt och internationalisering söker vi ständigt nya talanger. Är du expert inom mekanisk, elektrisk eller automationsdesign – eller har erfarenhet av projektledning? Då vill vi gärna träffa dig!

**Bli en del av vårt team och forma framtidens teknik tillsammans med oss!**


Läs mer: www.comatec.fi/en/

**Viktigt om CV och AI-matchning hos Comatec Sweden**


Comatec Sweden använder AI som stöd vid matchning mot uppdrag som komplement till traditionella intervjuer. Tänk därför på att ditt CV bör innehålla sökbara detaljer om dina meriter, verktyg, standarder, processer och relevanta “buzz-words”. Ju tydligare och mer specifik du är, desto större chans att du matchas mot rätt uppdrag.

title: Frontend Angular
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Jobbeskrivning**  

* Utveckla, vidareutveckla och förvalta systemlösningar med hög kvalitet och god förvaltningsbarhet.
* Säkerställa att utvecklade lösningar följer gällande referensarkitektur, tekniska riktlinjer och etablerade utvecklingsprinciper.
* Bidra till stabil drift och hög tillgänglighet genom proaktivt kvalitetsarbete samt effektiv incident- och felhantering.
* Genomföra och ansvara för enhetstester samt integrationstester, inklusive test mot angränsande system.
* Utföra felsökning och åtgärda komplexa problem i såväl utvecklings- som produktionsmiljö.

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 9 års erfarenhet

  

* Minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av att arbeta med inom Frontend ramverk – Angular, Typescript, Node.js
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av att skriva backend-for-frontend i Javascript/Typescript

  

**Meriterande**  

* Erfarenhet av Kubernetes i plattformar som t.ex. Openshift
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Git, Bitbucket, Jira, Confluence
* Erfarenhet av av DevOps-verktyg, CI/CD- pipelines, t.ex ArgoCD, Tekton eller liknande verktyg för deploy
* Erfarenhet av att jobba i agilt utvecklingsteam

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 10-03-2026 **Om Oss**  

Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?

  

Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.


Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.

  

Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Data Analyst
description:

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: PhD-student position in computational child protection research
description:
**Do you want to contribute to improving human health?**
--------------------------------------------------------

*To be a doctoral student means to devote oneself to a research project under supervision of experienced researchers and following an individual study plan. For a doctoral degree, the equivalent of four years of full-time doctoral education is required.*

### **The research group**


The Child Protection research group at Karolinska Institutet conducts research on preventing violence against children and works closely with Barnahus Stockholm on research concerning health and children's rights. The research group combines epidemiological research with methods development and has a strong commitment to translating research findings into practice and policy. The doctoral student will also participate in activities at Research Group Medical Technology and Digital Health.


This position is part of the joint doctoral programme in medical technology between Karolinska Institutet and the Royal Institute of Technology (KTH). The doctoral student will be admitted to doctoral education at both universities – in medical science at KI and in medical technology at KTH – with the aim of obtaining a joint doctoral degree. More information about the programme is available on KTH's website.

### **The doctoral student project and the duties of the doctoral student**


Do you want to work with machine learning to develop and validate entirely new practice-oriented methods? Public health research relies on labor-intensive methods such as systematic literature reviews, qualitative data analysis, survey instrument development, and data extraction from text-based records. These processes create bottlenecks that limit the scope and pace of research. Recent advances in artificial intelligence and natural language processing (NLP) offer opportunities to automate many of these tasks.


This doctoral project aims to develop, validate, and disseminate computational language methods across several interconnected areas, and through your work you will contribute to preventing violence against children.


The doctoral student will work under close supervision on methods development, conduct validation studies against expert assessments, contribute to scientific publications, and participate in developing open-source software and training materials.

### **What do we offer?**

A creative and inspiring environment full of expertise and curiosity. Karolinska Institutet is one of the world's leading medical universities. Our vision is to pursue the development of knowledge about life and to promote a better health for all. At Karolinska Institutet, we conduct successful medical research and hold the largest range of medical education in Sweden. As a doctoral student you are offered an individual research project, a well-educated supervisor, a vast range of elective courses and the opportunity to work in a leading research group. Karolinska Institutet collaborates with prominent universities from all around the world, which ensures opportunities for international exchanges. You will be employed on a doctoral studentship which means that you receive a contractual salary. Employees also have access to our modern gym for free and receive reimbursements for medical care.

### **Eligibility requirements for doctoral education**


In order to participate in the selection for a doctoral position, you must meet the following general **(A)** and specific **(B)** eligibility requirements at latest by the application deadline.


It is your responsibility to certify eligibility by following the instructions on the web page Entry requirements (eligibility) for doctoral education.  

  

  



**A) General eligibility requirement**
  

  

You meet the general eligibility requirement for doctoral/third-cycle/PhD education if you:

* have been awarded a second-cycle/advanced/master qualification (i.e. master degree), **or**
* have satisfied the requirements for courses comprising at least 240 credits of which at least 60 credits were awarded in the advanced/second-cycle/master level, **or**
* have acquired substantially equivalent knowledge in some other way in Sweden or abroad.\*


Follow the instructions on the web page Entry requirements (eligibility) for doctoral education.

* If you claim equivalent knowledge, follow the instructions on the web page Assessing equivalent knowledge for general eligibility for doctoral education.

**B) Specific eligibility requirement**

You meet the specific eligibility requirement for doctoral/third-cycle/PhD education if you:

* Show proficiency in English equivalent to the course English B/English 6 at Swedish upper secondary school.


Follow the instructions on the web page English language requirements for doctoral education.

*Verification of your documents* Karolinska Institutet checks the authenticity of your documents. Karolinska Institutet reserves the right to revoke admission if supporting documents are discovered to be fraudulent. Submission of false documents is a violation of Swedish law and is considered grounds for legal action.

**(A)** and **(B)** **can only** be certified by the documentation requirement for doctoral education.

### **Skills and personal qualities**

**Required:**

* Master’s degree, equivalent qualification, or at least 60 credits at an advanced level in medical engineering, medical informatics, computer science, data science, or a closely related field
* Documented experience in programming (e.g., Python, R, or similar) and applied machine learning
* Solid foundation in machine learning, statistics, or AI methods, with the ability to critically evaluate models and results
* Experience working with data-driven methods, including data preprocessing, analysis, and evaluation
* Strong ability to communicate scientific results orally and in writing in English
* Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in an interdisciplinary research environment
* Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and motivation to conduct doctoral-level researc

**Desirable qualifications and competencies:**

*Technical and research skills*

* Experience working with large language models (LLMs), natural language processing (NLP), or deep learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow)
* Familiarity with software development best practices, such as version control using Git/GitHub and writing maintainable, well-documented, and tested code
* Experience with research software engineering or reproducible research workflows
* Basic knowledge of DevOps, MLOps, or cloud-based computing environments (e.g., CI/CD, containerization, or experiment tracking)
* Experience conducting systematic literature reviews, qualitative research methods, or mixed-methods research

*Domain and interdisciplinary knowledge*

* Familiarity with public health, clinical research, or medical informatics
* Basic understanding of human physiology, healthcare systems, or medical data, considered an asset but not a requirement
* Interest in child protection, social care, or health-related applications of AI, particularly in sensitive or high-stakes domain

*Ethics, responsibility, and collaboration*

* Awareness of ethical, legal, and societal aspects of AI, including fairness, transparency, privacy, and responsible AI use
* Experience working with sensitive data or knowledge of data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR)
* Ability to collaborate with clinicians, social scientists, or policy-oriented researchers

*Language and communication*

* Proficiency in Swedish is an advantage but not required
* Experience presenting research at conferences or contributing to scientific publications is a merit

### **Terms and conditions**


The doctoral student will be employed on a doctoral studentship maximum 4 years full-time.

### **Application process**


Submit your application and supporting documents through the Varbi recruitment system. Use the button in the top right corner and follow the instructions. We prefer that your application is written in English, but you can also apply in Swedish.


Your application must contain the following documents:

* A personal letter and a curriculum vitae
* Degree projects and previous publications, if any
* Any other documentation showing the desirable skills and personal qualities described above
* Documents certifying your general eligibility (see **A** above)
* Documents certifying your specific eligibility (see **B** above)

### **Selection**


A selection will be made among eligible applicants on the basis of the ability to benefit from doctoral education. The qualifications of the applicants will be evaluated on an overall basis.


Karolinska Institutet uses the following bases of assessment:

* Documented subject knowledge of relevance to the area of research
* Analytical skill
* Other documented knowledge or experience that may be relevant to doctoral studies in the subject.


All applicants will be informed when the recruitment is completed.

*Your career continues here*

### **Want to make a difference? Join us and contribute to better health for all**

title: Platform Manager Integration Services | Technology & Platform | Inter IKEA
description:
**Job Description** **Hej Platform Manager! Ready to help shape the future with smart, innovative solutions?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to stretch your skills, experiment and work in new ways.


We are on a journey to transform the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. To make this shift possible, we need an organisation that is fully aligned with our Operating Model: one that works with a strong product‑ and platform‑ setup and mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to delivery.

**About the role**


We’re looking for an enthusiastic Platform Manager who wants to solve meaningful, real-world challenges that help make life at home better for the many. Join us on our journey as we strengthen and evolve our technology platforms to enable safe, reliable, and sustainable experiences across IKEA.


As Platform Manager for Integration Services, you are responsible for the integration development capability that connect systems and data across IKEA. You take lead in defining and delivering a high-quality service that meets the evolving needs from product and platform teams for unlocking and sharing data.


You drive performance and remove friction though fostering a Platform-as-a-Product mindset. Treating our integration service as a product, where success is measured by the velocity and value gained in the teams who consume it, you provide a service that ranges from development and operations of integrations to providing self-service to teams to sharing best practices. You and your team have in-depth understanding of the integration landscape at IKEA that you nurture and love to share.


Modernisation is a key part of your work, driving the shift towards a simple integration landscape where data is shared through events and APIs. Working closely with stakeholders and platform networks, you connect business needs with platform capabilities and communicate roadmaps and plans in a simple, accessible way. You also foster strong DevOps practices, automation and developer experience to support faster and more reliable delivery.


Leading people is a big part of the job. You grow high‑performing, curious teams with the skills we need today and in the future. Through competence development, succession planning, and an innovation mindset, you create the conditions for teams to thrive. You also take responsibility for budget planning, cost monitoring, and optimising spend. And by encouraging DevOps practices, automation, and a great developer experience, you help shorten delivery cycles and make life easier for many teams across IKEA.

**About you**


You combine technical depth with architecture and service delivery. You understand end‑to‑end digital product development and are comfortable with:

* enterprise integration patterns for event-driven architecture, API Management and data replication
* frameworks like ITIL for IT service operations
* agile frameworks, scaled delivery models, using metrics and OKRs to track value and drive continuous improvement.
* technology ecosystems with platforms and architecture across cloud and on‑prem environments, including DevOps, automation and modern software engineering principles.


You understand how IKEA works as a franchise system and have a good sense of our strategic direction and core business needs. You enjoy translating complex technical topics into simple business language. Budget awareness, cost optimisation and strong organisational skills help you lead transformation in a clear and structured way, even in fast‑changing or ambiguous situations.


You communicate with purpose, collaborate naturally across units, and build trusted relationships with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders. With a growth mindset, you continuously explore new ways of working and guide your teams through a never-ending wish to learn and collaborate.


Above all, to thrive at IKEA, you lead with our values and enjoy working in a culture built on togetherness, simplicity, cost-consciousness and a drive to always find better ways.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, whether that’s a music-playing lamp or plant-based food that’s better for the planet. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. By working closely with others across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

**Additional Information**


We look forward to hearing from you. If you have any questions about the role, please don’t hesitate to apply or connect, as we are proceeding quickly, therefore we will interview continuously during advertising. You can reach out to recruiter: Jordi Menick (jordi.menick@inter.ikea.com)


This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The job belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV and cover letter in English and let us know why you would be a good fit for this.

*Please apply by the 16th March 2026 and please note that we are interviewing continuously, so the position may close earlier.*  

  

We always recruit based on values, competence, potential, and diversity. We will prioritize co-workers employed in Inter IKEA Systems BV and Inter IKEA Technology Services AB provided competence requirements are met for the roles.
company_description: At IKEA, we share an inspiring vision: “to create a better everyday life for the many people”.

title: Platform Manager Integration Reengineering | Technology and Platform | Inter IKEA
description:
**Job Description** **Hej! Ready to help shape the future with smart, innovative solutions?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to stretch your skills, experiment and work in new ways.


We are transforming the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. To make this shift possible, we need an organisation that is fully aligned with our Operating Model: one that works with a strong product‑ and platform‑thinking mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to operations.


We are looking for passionate people who are energised by change, motivated by learning and driven by the opportunity to make a positive difference.

**About the role**


As Platform Manager for Integration Reengineering, you are at the centre of our modernization and adoption of Common Technology Foundation. Leading the full platform lifecycle of our integration technologies and defining the path forward for our legacy landscape. This includes activities such as decommissioning, uplifting, guiding and empowering our product teams on their modernization journey – contributing to the implementation of our overall roadmap.


A key part of the role is coordinating cross‑unit dependencies and aligning platform capability roadmaps with enterprise and business strategies. You work closely with technology and platform networks, architects, product teams and core businesses to build a common direction and communicate priorities, roadmaps and activity plans clearly across the organisation.


You drive performance and remove friction though fostering a Platform-as-a-Product mindset. Treating our integration platforms as a product, where success is measured by the velocity and autonomy of the engineering teams who consume them. You also foster strong DevOps practices, automation and developer experience to support faster and more reliable delivery.


Leading people is a big part of the job. As a leader, you grow high‑performing, curious teams with the skills we need today and in the future. Through competence development, succession planning, and an innovation mindset, you create the conditions for teams to thrive. You also take responsibility for budget planning, cost monitoring, and optimising spend.

**About you**


You move confidently between technical depth and business context, drawing from solid experience in platforms, architecture, service management and digital product development. You are comfortable navigating frameworks such as Agile, DevOps, ITIL and TOGAF, and you understand how to apply them in practice to achieve meaningful outcomes.


You enjoy translating complex technical topics into simple business language. You communicate with purpose, collaborate naturally across units, and build trusted relationships with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders. With a growth mindset, you continuously explore new technologies, new ways of working, and you guide teams through change and a never-ending wish to learn more and collaborate.

**To be successful in this role, the following knowledge, skills and experiences would be valuable:**

* Strong understanding of platforms, architecture and technology ecosystems across cloud, on‑prem and hybrid environments
* Software engineering at scale - API-first design, event-based architecture, API Gateways, and Legacy-to-Cloud strangler patterns
* Experience applying agile frameworks, scaled delivery models, metrics and OKRs to drive value and improvement
* Proven ability to lead and develop high‑performing technical teams and drive organisational change


Above all, your leadership is grounded in IKEA values: you build trust, collaborate across organisational boundaries and influence without relying on formal authority.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, whether that’s a music-playing lamp or plant-based food that’s better for the planet. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. By working closely with others across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

**Additional Information**


We look forward to hearing from you. If you have any questions about the role, please don’t hesitate to apply or connect, as we are proceeding quickly, therefore we will interview continuously during advertising. You can reach out to recruiter: Jordi Menick (jordi.menick@inter.ikea.com)


This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The job belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV and cover letter in English and let us know why you would be a good fit for this.

*Please apply by the 16th March 2026 and please note that we are interviewing continuously, so the position may close earlier.*


We always recruit based on values, competence, potential, and diversity. We will prioritize co-workers employed in Inter IKEA Systems BV and Inter IKEA Technology Services AB provided competence requirements are met for the roles.

title: Bli vår nästa Tech Lead
description:
Vi söker en erfaren utvecklare som vill ta steget till Tech Lead och som vill vara med och forma framtiden för våra kunders samhällsviktiga system. Som Tech Lead hos CGI kommer du få leda ditt utvecklingsteam, antingen genom att leda ett av våra befintliga team eller vara med och sätta ihop ett nytt team.  

  

Är du redo för nästa steg i karriären? Välkommen med din ansökan!

**Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter**


Du kommer att vara en nyckelperson i ett agilt team där eget initiativ, ansvarstagande och flexibilitet är centrala. Du ansvarar för att planera, förbättra och implementera lösningar enligt givna riktlinjer i nära samarbete med projektorganisationen hos kunderna. Vi ser att du har ett stort engagemang att dela med dig av dina kunskaper till mer juniora kollegor och ta en aktiv roll i mentorskapet.  

  

Dina ansvarsområden  

* Leda och coacha utvecklingsteamet för att säkerställa hög kvalitet och leverans.
* Delta aktivt i kravhantering, systemdesign och arkitektur.
* Samarbeta med andra avdelningar för att förstå och möta verksamhetens behov.
**Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll**


Vi söker dig som har:  

* Flera års erfarenhet av systemutveckling med fördel inom Java, men även C#/.Net om du själv är intresserad av och kan leda ett team i Java/Linux-miljö. Det är även önskvärt om du har erfarenhet av databaser, container-teknik, moderna webbramverk, säkerhet, DevOps, testramverk, källkodshantering samt agila metoder och verktyg.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila miljöer och en vilja att leda team genom hela utvecklingskedjan, från krav till test och underhåll.
* Språk och medborgarskap, förslagsvis: för den här tjänsten behöver du även behärska svenska i både tal och skrift. För rollen krävs även svenskt medborgarskap då bakgrundskontroller och registerkontroll kommer att genomföras för tilltänkta uppdrag.

  

**Vi erbjuder:**  

* Möjligheten att vara med och driva en av våra största satsningar inom Systemutveckling i Norra Sverige inom offentlig sektor.
* En välkomnande arbetsmiljö där du får möjlighet att påverka och utvecklas.
* Möjlighet att arbeta med intressanta uppdrag hos våra kunder som är tekniskt drivande i det offentliga Sverige.
* Ett engagerat och kompetent nätverk av kollegor som värnar om kvalitet, innovation, utveckling, gemenskap och att ha roligt på jobbet.


  

För dig som har ambitioner att växa vidare i din karriär finns många möjligheter hos oss. Här börjar många som utvecklare – men växer med tiden in i roller som Arkitekt, Testledare, Scrum Master, DevOps-specialist, Tech Lead eller konsultchef. Hos CGI uppmuntrar vi intern rörlighet och kompetensutveckling, och vi ser gärna att du utforskar nya områden i takt med att din erfarenhet och ditt intresse växer. Vill du ta nästa steg? Hos oss finns vägarna – och kollegorna som stöttar dig längs vägen.  

  

Utöver detta erbjuder vi bland annat nedan förmåner:  

* Aktieprogram och delägarskap: Som delägare har du möjlighet att påverka och i vårt aktieprogram matchar CGI ditt bidrag, krona för krona upp till 3% av din månadslön
* Friskvårdsbidrag med 4000 kr per år
* Föräldralön med en ersättning som motsvarar minst 90% av din lön under första tiden hemma
* Trygg anställning genom kollektivavtal och försäkringar
* Pensionslösningar som är attraktiva och förmånliga
* Fast lönemodell

  

**Vill du veta mer?**  

Skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningar löpande. Vill du veta mer om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande chef Susanne Cillerwall, susanne.cillerwall@cgi.com.  

  

#LI-EK4**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**  

  

Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.  

  

Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.  

  

Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.  

  

Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
  

  

Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.
company_description: Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Digital Product Owner
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

**About the Role**


Are you passionate about shaping world-class developer experiences and driving product strategy for internal platforms? As a Digital Product Owner for the Internal Developer Portal, you will define and evolve the product vision for Volvo’s Internal Developer Platform (IDP).


The Internal Developer Portal serves as the front door to our engineering ecosystem—bringing together golden paths, DevSecOps automation, cloud services, AI-powered tooling, and platform capabilities into a unified experience for thousands of developers.


In this role, you will own the product strategy, roadmap, and value realization of the portal. You will work closely with platform engineering, DevSecOps, cloud, AI, and security teams to ensure we deliver a seamless, secure, and intelligent developer experience that accelerates software delivery and reduces cognitive load.


This role is ideal for a strategic product leader who thrives at the intersection of platform engineering, developer experience, automation, and AI-driven innovation.

**What You’ll Do**

 **Define & Drive Product Vision**

* Own the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for the Internal Developer Portal.
* Align portal capabilities with Volvo’s broader Internal Developer Platform strategy.
* Translate engineering needs, business priorities, and technical strategy into clear product outcomes.
* Prioritize initiatives that improve developer productivity, platform adoption, and standardization.

 **Lead Roadmap & Delivery**

* Manage and maintain a transparent, outcome-driven backlog.
* Partner closely with engineering teams to refine requirements and define MVPs.
* Balance short-term delivery with long-term platform scalability and sustainability.
* Define and track KPIs such as adoption and developer satisfaction.

 **Champion Developer Experience**

* Act as the voice of the developer across the organization.
* Gather feedback through user research, analytics, and stakeholder engagement.
* Ensure golden paths (CI/CD, IaC templates, security standards) are intuitive, discoverable, and frictionless.
* Drive improvements in usability, discoverability, and workflow integration.

 **Integrate AI & Intelligent Automation**

* Shape the product direction for AI-powered capabilities within the portal, including:
	+ Contextual help and intelligent onboarding
	+ Knowledge discovery and documentation insights
	+ Service scaffolding and automation workflows
	+ Platform intelligence and recommendations
* Collaborate with AI and engineering teams to prioritize high-value use cases.

 **Governance, Security & Standardization**

* Ensure secure-by-default practices are embedded into product requirements.
* Partner with security and compliance teams to align guardrails with developer workflows.
* Support standardization through templates, policies, and automated controls.

 **Stakeholder & Cross-Team Collaboration**

* Collaborate with Golden Path, cloud platform, DevSecOps, and security teams to deliver cohesive experiences.
* Communicate product vision, progress, and outcomes to engineering leadership.
* Drive adoption through internal engagement, demos, and change management initiatives
**What You’ll Bring**

 **Product Leadership Experience**

* Proven experience as a Digital Product Owner, Product Manager, or similar role in platform, DevOps, or engineering enablement domains.
* Experience owning internal platforms or developer-facing products.
* Strong ability to define measurable outcomes and translate strategy into actionable roadmaps.

 **Technical Understanding**

* Solid understanding of:
	+ Internal Developer Platforms (IDPs)
	+ DevSecOps practices, CI/CD, GitOps, and cloud-native architectures
	+ Kubernetes and modern cloud environments (Azure preferred)
	+ Infrastructure as Code and automated provisioning
* Familiarity with developer portals and software catalogs in enterprise environments.
* Awareness of AI/LLM-powered tooling and how it can enhance developer workflows.

 **Data-Driven & Outcome-Oriented**

* Experience defining and tracking product KPIs and adoption metrics.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to make data-informed prioritization decisions.
* Comfortable balancing technical complexity with business value.

 **Collaboration & Communication**

* Strong stakeholder management skills across engineering, security, and leadership.
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear product narratives.
* Empathy for developers and passion for improving their daily workflows
**Why Join Us?**

  

You will play a critical role in shaping Volvo’s Internal Developer Platform and redefining how engineering teams build, deploy, and operate software.

 **Your impact will:**

* Improve developer productivity and reduce friction across the enterprise.
* Align golden paths, cloud platforms, CI/CD pipelines, and DevSecOps automation into a unified product experience.
* Introduce intelligent, AI-driven capabilities that accelerate onboarding and decision-making.
* Help build a modern, secure, scalable, and developer-centric platform ecosystem.

  

If you’re excited about leading the product strategy behind a cutting-edge Internal Developer Portal and driving measurable impact for engineering teams at scale, we’d love to hear from you.

  

Join us and help shape the future of developer experience at Volvo.

  

“In some countries and for specific positions within Volvo Group Digital & IT, background checks may be required, in accordance with local laws & regulations. If this is applicable to the role you have applied for, you will be informed.”

  

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

 **Who we are and what we believe in**  

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

  

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join **Volvo Group**. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

 **Group Digital & IT** is the hub for digital development within Volvo Group. Imagine yourself working with cutting-edge technologies in a global team, represented in more than 30 countries. We are dedicated to leading the way of tomorrow’s transport solutions, guided by a strong customer mindset and high level of curiosity, both as individuals and as a team. Here, you will thrive in your career in an environment where your voice is heard and your ideas matter.
company_description: Every day, we work with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to leave our society in better shape for the next generation.

title: System Engineer, Cloud Engineer
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 is an IT and technology consulting company that provides highly specialized expertise within IT, software development, SAP, purchasing, electronics and mechanical design. We collaborate with experienced senior experts and deliver strategic value-creating expertise to some of Sweden's most complex and analytically demanding projects. Our focus is always on high quality, professionalism and clear, measurable results.
   

  

 We are now seeking a
 **System Engineer, Cloud Engineer** 
 for one of our clients.
   

  

**Assignment Description﻿**
 System Engineer, Cloud Engineer, nivå 4
   

  

 Own the production readiness, capacity planning and scalability aspects of the platform running on Kubernetes.
   

  

 Work hand-in hand with Tech Lead, DevOps and the external Cloud provider.
   

  

 In short: measure, model and prove that it will work at scale.
   

  

**Relevant knowledge/experience:**
 Cloud Platforms
   

  

 Kubernetes Operations
   

  

 Datastores
   

  

 Performance Testing
   

  

 Automation
   

  

 Observability
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Mission length** 
 : approx. 6 months
   

  

**Application Deadline:** 
 2026-03-09
   

  

 Are you the right person for the assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate? Do not hesitate to contact us.
   

  

 Please apply directly through our system with:
   

  

* Your updated CV in english

 In the motivation, describe why you are suitable for this assignment - refer to previous consulting assignments, employmxent, education and personal qualities.
   

  

**Please note:** 
 We do not accept any applications through mail. All applications have to be sent through the portal to be valid.
   

  

**Offer continuously:**

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Vill du arbeta med samhällsviktiga lösningar och samtidigt vara med och effektivisera hur de levereras till kund? Nu söker vi en DevOps Engineer till Ida Infronts affärsområde Case Solutions.
 



 I den här rollen får du en central funktion där du blir länken mellan utveckling, plattform och kund. Då rollen är ny kommer du få möjlighet att påverka arbetssätt, bygga struktur och driva automatisering i en miljö som kombinerar både on-prem och SaaS.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Som DevOps Engineer kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i teamet där du arbetar nära utvecklare och kunder och du utgör länken mellan utvecklarteamet och vår plattformsorganisation. Du ansvarar för att säkerställa effektiva, stabila och säkra leveranser av vår produkt, iipax case.
 



 Dina arbetsuppgifter innefattar bland annat att:
 


* Automatisera drift och deployment av vår produkt iipax case.
* Designa, implementera och vidareutveckla CI/CD-pipelines
* Bygga och underhålla ramverk för automatiska tester.
* Sätta upp testmiljöer automatisera processer samt scripting
* Samarbeta med kunder kring IT-arkitektur och leverans.
* Delta i nykundsprojekt och stötta i tekniska dialoger kring drift och arkitektur
* Samarbeta med plattformsteamet kring infrastruktur och containerbaserade lösningar, exempelvis Kubernetes
* Bidra till förbättrade processer, strukturer och arbetssätt i leveranskedjan



  





 Rollen innebär arbete i både traditionella on-prem-miljöer och moderna containerbaserade lösningar. Du blir en viktig brygga mellan utveckling och kundens driftmiljö och förväntas ta ett helhetsansvar för att få hela kedjan från kod till fungerande installation att hänga ihop.
 



 Du kommer att arbeta från något av våra kontor med placering i centrala Linköping eller i Stockholm. Utöver detta har vi en distansarbetspolicy som möjliggör arbete från t. ex. ditt hemmakontor.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet inom DevOps, Linux eller infrastruktur och som vill ta nästa steg i en roll där du får kombinera teknik, förbättringsarbete och kommunikation.
 



 Vi ser att du har:
 


* Erfarenhet av Linux-baserade miljöer, on-prem och/eller SaaS
* Erfarenhet av DevOps-metoder och CI/CD
* Vana av scripting, exempelvis Bash eller Python
* Förståelse för säkerhetsaspekter i utvecklings- och driftmiljöer
* God kommunikativ förmåga och trivs i dialog med både kollegor och kunder



  





 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av containerbaserade lösningar såsom Kubernetes samt monitorering och logghantering.
 



  





 Som person är du lösningsorienterad, strukturerad och prestigelös. Du tar gärna initiativ, driver förbättring och trivs i en roll där du får kombinera självständigt arbete med nära samarbete. Du är nyfiken på ny teknik, vill utvecklas vidare och delar gärna med dig av din kunskap.
 



 Rollen kräver svenskt medborgarskap samt att du talar och skriver svenska obehindrat, då arbetet sker i säkerhetsklassade projekt.
 



  





**Om Ida Infront** 




 Ida Infront är ett svenskt produktbolag som utvecklar digitala lösningar för samhällskritiska verksamheter. Produktfamiljen iipax möjliggör bland annat passfri rörlighet inom Europa, e-deklarationer och effektiv ärendehantering hos myndigheter.
 



 Här blir du en del av ett framgångsrikt IT-produktföretag med platt organisation och stabil kundbas. Vi är också ett värderingsstyrt företag med stark laganda som satsar på ledarskap samt våra medarbetare och deras möjligheter till kompetensutveckling.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar Ida Infront med Skill. Har du frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Sofie Ilhed, sofie.ilhed@skill.se.
 



  





 Vi går igenom urvalet löpande, så varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Lead Solution Design(Snowflake)
description:

 Lead the technical design for data-driven applications within DevOps squads, ensuring alignment with the Tech Accelerator roadmap.
* **Snowflake Ecosystem:**

 Automate infrastructure and deployment patterns (IaC) to accelerate delivery speed without compromising bank-grade security.
* **Technical Mentorship:** 
 Act as the lead authority for engineering teams, dismantling legacy silos and promoting cloud-native best practices.



 Critical Competencies
 



**Pillar Requirement** 




**Data Platform** 




 Expert-level
 **Snowflake** 
 (Warehouse profiling, Snowpark, RBAC).
 



**Cloud Finance** 




 Proven
 **FinOps** 
 experience (Unit economics, tagging, cost-optimization).
 



**Delivery** 




 Deep
 **DevOps** 
 fluency (CI/CD, Terraform/Bicep, GitOps).
 



**Domain** 




 Experience in
